title: Sanji’s Childhood Wound
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Sanji, Ichiji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji’s past explains why his family name is a wound rather than a source of pride.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When the family caught wind that you'd recently been running around as a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We all thought, well hey maybe this is a good thing... it'll help that little runt grow and mature a little bit!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that was apparently wishful thinking ...look at you... as pathetic as ever...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've committed a grave sin... and I'm gonna drill that lesson into that head of yours!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd tread lightly if I were you, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not forget, that we've got quick and easy access to your East Blue Schilles heel.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well this is unexpected... I didn't even know you swung that way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You and that pathetic excuse for a chef would make a cute couple...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just try and fight back... I dare you... all the blood spilled over at the East Blue will be on your hands.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aww Sanji, if I knew she meant that much to you I would've beat that peasant black and blue everywhere but her face!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you don't mind the company of a Cripple, I'm sure we can arrange it so that she's a member of your personal staff!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 28 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
